description: A hospital has reported a critical field failure for CardioMon Pro Patient Monitor (serial number CM-2024-089). Log in as admin/admin. Identify all sibling serial numbers received in the same inbound receipt as the defective unit that are currently in warehouse stock. Create an Internal Location named 'Quarantine' and transfer these specific in-stock sibling units to it, ensuring no units from unaffected receipts are included.

natural_language.prompt: A hospital has reported a critical field failure for CardioMon Pro Patient Monitor (serial number CM-2024-089). Use the traceability features to find the original inbound receipt for this specific defective unit. Identify all 'sibling' serial numbers that were received in that exact same batch. Find which of those sibling units are currently in our warehouse stock. Create an Internal Location named 'Quarantine' and execute an internal transfer to move ONLY the in-stock sibling units to Quarantine. Do not quarantine any units from unaffected inbound receipts.
